pages.title: UAE Office
pages.content:
Strategically Located. Fully Equipped. Built for Excellence.

Hindustan Portable Cabins proudly announces the expansion of our operations to the United Arab Emirates, marking a new milestone in our journey. Our UAE office is established to strengthen global presence and serve the international market with trusted, premium Made in India portable cabins.

📍 2605, Al Manara Tower, Al Abraj Street, Sharjah Media City, Sharjah, United Arab Emirates

Our UAE Operations

Our UAE office is dedicated exclusively to trading of office containers, designed and manufactured in India at our state-of-the-art facilities. The cabins are then exported via sea routes to the UAE, ensuring seamless supply of top-quality products for international clients.

Why UAE Market?

The UAE is a hub for construction and infrastructure development, and we are proud to deliver world-class, Made in India portable solutions to support this growing demand. Indian construction companies operating in the UAE can now conveniently procure reliable cabins directly through us – ensuring faster availability, premium quality, and excellent workmanship.

Our Commitment

At Hindustan Portable Cabins, quality and trust are at the heart of everything we do. Our expansion into the UAE market is not just about growth – it is about showcasing India’s manufacturing excellence on a global platform. With our new presence in Sharjah, we aim to provide international clients with:

  • 🏭 Premium Portable Office Cabins
  • 👷‍♂️ Export-Grade Quality Standards
  • 📦 Timely Supply through Sea Routes
  • 🧑‍💼 Trusted Service & Support

Contact Us

  • 📞 Phone Numbers: 9000088459
  • ✉️ Email IDs: mohammed@hpcabins.in

This is a proud moment for the entire HPC team, as we continue to prove that we are not just serving India, but expanding globally – delivering Make in India products that meet the highest standards of durability and design.

pages.title: ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India (AM/NS India) – Nakkapalli Steel Plant
pages.content:
• Client: ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India (AM/NS India)
  • Project Location: Nakkapalli, Anakapalli District, Andhra Pradesh

Hindustan Portable Cabins is proud to have played a vital role in supporting the massive ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India (AM/NS India) steel plant project, one of the largest investments in the Indian steel sector, valued at ₹1,47,162 crore, located in Nakkapalli, Anakapalli district.

For this landmark project, we supplied a comprehensive range of high-quality modular containers tailored to meet diverse on-site needs — from standard operational cabins to exclusive VIP containers designed for hosting foreign clients during site visits.

Scope of Work Delivered:

  • Variety of Office Containers and Accommodation Units for staff and management
  • Specialized VIP Containers offering premium comfort for international guests
  • Containers designed and supplied from our Visakhapatnam (Vizag) manufacturing unit
  • Modular, durable, and scalable solutions supporting plant phases from 7.30 MTPA to 10.50 MTPA capacity

Our container solutions helped facilitate smooth project operations and enhanced hospitality standards at the site, aligning with the scale and prestige of this industry-defining steel plant.

Hindustan Portable Cabins remains committed to enabling India’s industrial growth by delivering robust, adaptable, and high-quality portable infrastructure.

pages.title: Andhra Pradesh MedTech Zone Ltd (AMTZ) – COVID-19 Emergency Healthcare Support
pages.content:
• Client: Andhra Pradesh MedTech Zone Ltd (AMTZ)
  • Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh

During the unprecedented COVID-19 crisis, Hindustan Portable Cabins stood at the frontlines of the national response, supplying fully-equipped hospital containers in partnership with Andhra Pradesh MedTech Zone Ltd (AMTZ) – India’s premier medical device manufacturing park.

These mobile medical units played a crucial role in providing emergency care across the country, aiding state governments in their pandemic response efforts.

What We Delivered:

40-feet Hospital Containers housing:

8 patient beds

Oxygen concentrators

Doctor consultation rooms

Ventilation, sanitation, and essential medical infrastructure

  • Rapid deployment across multiple states
  • Supplied from all our manufacturing units:
    Hyderabad, Visakhapatnam, Bangalore, Ranchi, Bhubaneswar, Ahmedabad, Delhi, and Vijayawada

This project is a testament to our unwavering commitment to serving the nation in times of crisis, delivering healthcare infrastructure when it was needed most.

Hindustan Portable Cabins – Always Ready. Always Reliable.

Scope of Work Delivered:

  • Heavy-duty Accommodation Containers with reinforced walls for enhanced protection
  • Office and Command Centers for strategic operations
  • Fully equipped utility containers with all necessary amenities to support continuous deployment in tough field conditions

Taking on this challenging project, Hindustan Portable Cabins demonstrated its commitment to serving the nation by delivering robust, mission-critical infrastructure that helps ensure the safety and security of key transport corridors.

pages.title: Scrap Metal Removal
pages.content:
Scrap metal removal is an essential service for homeowners, businesses, and construction sites looking to dispose of unwanted metal efficiently and responsibly. Whether it’s old appliances, machinery, car parts, or industrial waste, professional scrap metal removal services ensure that these materials are collected, sorted, and recycled properly. Removing scrap metal not only helps clear up space but also contributes to environmental sustainability by reducing landfill waste and conserving natural resources. Many scrap metal removal services offer convenient pickup options, making the process hassle-free for clients.

Some companies even pay for valuable metals like copper, aluminum, and brass, turning waste into profit. Additionally, proper disposal prevents hazardous materials from contaminating the environment. Whether you need a one-time pickup or regular scrap metal collection, hiring a professional ensures safe handling and transportation. From residential cleanouts to large-scale industrial projects, scrap metal removal services help keep properties clean while promoting eco-friendly recycling practices.

pages.title: Scrap Car Removal
pages.content:
Scrap car removal is an eco-friendly and convenient solution for disposing of old, damaged, or unwanted vehicles. Whether your car is no longer drivable, has high repair costs, or is simply taking up space, professional scrap car removal services offer an easy way to get rid of it. These services typically provide free towing, ensuring that you don’t have to worry about transportation. Many companies also offer instant cash payments based on the condition, make, and model of your vehicle. In addition to freeing up space, scrap car removal benefits the environment by recycling usable parts and properly disposing of hazardous materials like batteries and fluids. The metal from scrapped cars is often reused in manufacturing, reducing the need for new raw materials. Most services handle all the necessary paperwork, making the process hassle-free.

By choosing a reliable scrap car removal service, you not only earn some extra cash but also contribute to sustainability efforts. Whether your vehicle is old, wrecked, or non-functional, professional car removal services provide a stress-free way to clear it from your property while ensuring responsible recycling and disposal.

pages.title: Features
pages.content:
About Able Internet Payroll Ltd:

Able Internet Payroll was the first cloud based payroll company to gain HMRC RTI recognition since the HMRC scheme started 12 years ago. It is also the first package that combines the payroll and the AE functions into one single process. This allows you to complete both your payroll and AE at the same time, comprehensively, without needing additional costly and time wasting separate middleware for AE.

Join us:

The package has served thousands of users and is feature rich, very simple to learn, easy to use and all its pay calculations are fully in compliance with the latest legislation. You may sign up to this unique cloud based combined payroll and AE service as a single company, a pay bureau, or as a white labelled pay bureau with a cloud payroll package running under your own name.

Combined payroll and auto enrolment in one process:

The key features of the Able payroll package is that the AE process is built within the usual periodical pay run process. This allows you to complete your AE process in parallel with completing each pay run. No more painful, expensive and time wasting AE middleware processing is needed as the employee AE assessment is included in the package. Communication letters and contribution data are automatically consolidated under the same click when you commit the usual pay run process. AE postponement, employee opt in and opt out, are all featured in the Able payroll package.

You can set up one pension provider with one pension scheme, or multiple pension providers with multiple pension schemes within the Able payroll system. Whichever pension provider or scheme you choose, the Able payroll package will support it. The pension providers require CSV files that are tailored to the pension providers you have chosen and are instantly made available at the end of each pay run in the Reports section ready for you to download.

PAPDIS data output format is also available on Able for you to use for any pension providers who support this industrial standard.

Payroll via the Internet:

You can sign up with us and run your payroll securely from any Internet point, be it from your office, your home, or on the move 24/7. No more CD’s to install and the payroll and AE package are always professionally managed and updated over the cloud to keep your calculations up to date.

You may sign up to this unique cloud based combined payroll and AE service as a single company, an ordinary pay bureau, or as a white labelled pay bureau with a cloud payroll package running under your own pay bureau name.

Employee payroll accounts:

Your employees can have individual accounts similar to Internet banking accounts to securely view and print their own current and past (up to 3 years) payslips, P60s and P11Ds at any time and update their own personal contact details.

Auto tax code and other notice updates:

Any changes resulting from P6 and P9 tax code and other notices, such as SL1 and NINO will be automatically updated for you. You may also make global tax code updates at the beginning of the tax year.

RTI eReturns:

At the end of each pay run the relevant RTI forms to be e-filed will be automatically compiled ready for you to view, approve and e-file to HMRC. With just a few clicks of the mouse your returns will be completed. The range of RTI returns include FPS, EPS, NVR and EYU.

Our philosophy is that in this fast changing Information Technology age who you are today is not important. It is what you do today that counts because this determines your future. Whether you are able to survive and grow depends on whether you are able to master the technology to improve your operation. Mastering and exploiting Internet technology will definitely improve your productivity and competitiveness. Able Internet Payroll Ltd is here to provide the services that you require in the future.

Auto P11 reports and pay summaries:

Once your payroll is processed your pay figures will automatically be posted to the respective individual employee P11s, as well as the Pay Summary section. With just one click you can view a breakdown of the employee’s earning details and year to date values.

Auto consolidation of monthly/quarterly P32 (EPR) returns to the HMRC:

The amount an employer needs to pay to the HMRC each month or each quarter is automatically and dynamically consolidated. This amount is usually reflected in your EPR. You can view the EPR at any time. The amount payable to HMRC is also linked to the optional ePayment facility. Should any employee’s pay be amended, our relational database management system will dynamically update the latest P32 data.

Reports:

The system provides comprehensive reports for all the statutory requirements and additional costing reports.

Data exports for reports:

In addition to the routine comprehensive reports, the system further provides all the key data in CSV files ready for you to export. You can create further reports based on the exported data in an Excel file.

Accounting packages compatible:

The default setting for nominal accounting data export to an accounting package is Sage. However, the export setting can be changed to suit any accounting package you use.

Note:

We are able to automate the above mentioned reports because we are using a powerful relational database management system normally only used in mainframe computer systems. You are paying just a fraction of the cost for a powerful system.
